verse.name: v1
v2
v3
verse.lines: Aren’t you glad that the Lord brought you out? Aren’t you glad that the Lord brought you out? If it had not been for Jesus, oh where would I be? I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve been singing since the Lord brought me out, I’ve been singing since the Lord brought me out; If it had not been for Jesus, oh where would I be? I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out.
